To go. Example: 홍대로 가주세요 = Please go to: To come. Example: 여기로 와주세요 = Please come here.
To do. Example: 뭐 해요? = What are you doing?
To eat. Example: 먹고 갈게요 = I will eat here.
To drink. Example: 커피 마셔요 = I drink coffee.
To see or watch. Example: 혼자 볼게요 = I will look by myself.
To know. Example: 알겠어요 = I understand.
To not know. Example: 잘 모르겠어요 = I am not sure.
To have or exist. Example: 있어요? = Do you have it?
To not have. Example: 없어요 = I do not have one.
To give. Example: 물 주세요 = Water, please.
To buy. Example: 이거 살게요 = I will buy this.
To take a photo. Example: 같이 찍어요 = Let's take a photo together.
To like. Example: 한국 좋아해요 = I like Korea.
To stop or pull over. Example: 세워주세요 = Please stop.
To give politely. Example: 영수증 드릴까요? = Do you need a receipt?
To press for someone. Example: 좋아요 눌러줘 = Hit like.
To meet. Example: 다음에 또 만나 = See you next time.
To wait. Example: 기다려줘 = Wait for me.
To ask a favor. Example: 부탁해요 = Please help me with this.
